title: Full app aesthetic redesign: MI logo, white+blue+red theme, black text, green saved state, invoice column label fixes

requirements.text: Redesign the main navigation header (Layout.tsx) with a professional aesthetic: use a deep navy blue background, display the MI logo (a bold square badge with 'MI' initials in white on a red background) on the left, followed by 'MANISH INFRATECH' in white bold typography. Navigation links (Add Bill, Search Bills, Summary, Party Summary) must be styled with white text and a red active/hover underline or highlight. The Logout button must be styled with a red background and white text. Apply this header consistently across all pages.

quotes: make it esthetic good looking MI written as logo in white+blue+red theme and whole app also
Redesign it and make it esthetic

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation header has a deep navy blue background
MI logo badge (red square with bold white 'MI') is visible in the top-left of the header
'MANISH INFRATECH' text is visible in white bold typography next to the logo
All nav links are white with red hover/active styling
Logout button is red with white text
Header is consistent across Add Bill, Search Bills, Summary, Party Summary, and Company Report pages

requirements.text: Apply a consistent white+blue+red color theme across every page of the app (Add Bill, Search Bills, Summary, Party Summary, Company Report). Page backgrounds must be warm off-white or light gray (not pure white). Section cards and form containers must have white backgrounds with a subtle navy blue border or shadow. Primary action buttons (Save Bill, Search, Apply Filter, Download Report) must use a deep navy blue background with white text. Secondary/outline buttons must use a white background with navy blue border and text. Table headers must use a deep navy blue background with white text. Table rows must alternate between white and a very light blue-gray. All input fields must have a navy blue focus ring.

quotes: white+blue+red theme and whole app also
Redesign it and make it esthetic

acceptanceCriteria: Page backgrounds across all pages are off-white or light gray, not pure white
Card/form containers have white backgrounds with subtle navy borders or shadows
Primary buttons (Save Bill, Search, etc.) are deep navy with white text
Table headers are navy blue with white text
Table rows alternate white and light blue-gray
Input fields show a navy blue focus ring
Red is used as an accent color for highlights, badges, active states, and error indicators

requirements.text: Change all body text, form labels, table cell text, heading text, and placeholder text throughout the entire app to use black or very dark gray (#1a1a1a or equivalent) instead of white. No text in the main content area (forms, tables, cards, page bodies) should be white. White text is only acceptable on intentionally dark/colored backgrounds such as the navigation header, navy button backgrounds, or red button backgrounds.

quotes: all are written in pure white so not visible so make all text in black color

acceptanceCriteria: All form labels in AddBillForm and EditBillModal are black/dark text
All table cell text in BillResultsTable, PartySummaryPage, CompanyReportPage, and SummaryPage is black/dark
All page headings and section titles are black/dark
Input field text values are black/dark
No white text appears on light/white backgrounds anywhere in the app
'Save Bill' button label is clearly visible (white on navy background)

requirements.text: Display all success/saved confirmation messages and success toast notifications in green text or with a green background badge. This includes the bill saved confirmation after submitting AddBillForm, the edit saved confirmation after EditBillModal submission, the GST number saved confirmation on PartySummaryPage, and any other success state currently rendered in white or another non-visible color.

quotes: saved text in green not to use white text

acceptanceCriteria: Bill saved confirmation message is displayed in green
Edit bill saved confirmation is displayed in green
GST number saved confirmation is displayed in green
No success message is rendered in white text on a white or light background

requirements.text: Fix the line item column headers and input field placeholders in AddBillForm and EditBillModal so that each column is clearly and visibly labeled. The table header row must show the following column labels in bold dark text: 'Sr. No.', 'HSN Code', 'Product Name', 'Qty', 'Unit', 'Rate (₹)', 'Amount (₹)'. Each input field within a row must have a matching placeholder (e.g. placeholder='Qty' for the quantity input, placeholder='Unit' for the unit input, placeholder='Rate' for the rate input). The computed Amount column must display the calculated value clearly. Ensure column headers are always visible and not hidden or white-on-white.

quotes: in the invoice no written where to write quantity where unit and where price so fix it up
Fix invoice line item column headers/placeholders so it's clear which field is for Quantity, Unit, and Price/Rate

acceptanceCriteria: Line item table in AddBillForm has visible column headers: Sr. No., HSN Code, Product Name, Qty, Unit, Rate (₹), Amount (₹)
Line item table in EditBillModal has the same visible column headers
Qty input has placeholder 'Qty'
Unit input has placeholder 'Unit'
Rate input has placeholder 'Rate'
HSN Code input has placeholder 'HSN Code'
Product Name input has placeholder 'Product Name'
Column headers are in dark/black text and clearly visible against the table header background
The printed invoice (InvoicePrintView) also displays the same column headers: Sr. No., HSN Code, Product Name, Qty, Unit, Rate (₹), Amount (₹)

constraints: Do not change the invoice print view's red header band, white body, or red accent GST summary borders — only the on-screen app theme is being updated
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not change any backend logic, data models, or API signatures
The MI logo in the navigation header must be rendered as an inline styled HTML element (not a generated image file dependency)
nonGoals: Changing the invoice print view's red/white color scheme
Adding new pages or navigation routes
Adding new form fields or data model changes
